scripts.build: npm run build -w @codex-remote-control/shared && npm run build -w @codex-remote-control/relay && npm run build -w @codex-remote-control/host-agent && npm run build -w @codex-remote-control/mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @codex-remote-control/shared && npm run typecheck -w @codex-remote-control/relay && npm run typecheck -w @codex-remote-control/host-agent && npm run typecheck -w @codex-remote-control/mobile
